full_text:
Wang Rong (Junchong) 王戎 (濬沖)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Rong (王戎), styledJunchong (濬沖), was born in Lang Ya [琅邪] in Shan Dong [山东]. A child prodigy, one of the Seven Sages of the Bamboo Grove. Noted for his meanness. Wang Rong was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty. Wang Rong lived during the Three Kingdoms and Jin Dynasty period of Chinese history.
